nodes.label: Computation State
nodes.source:
struct ComputationState {
    algorithm: String,
    call_depth: usize,
    max_depth_seen: usize,
    memo_hits: usize,
    total_calls: usize,
}

nodes.label: Factorial
Fibonacci
Partition
Quick Sort
Run Recursion Examples
Tree Depth
Tree Sum
